## Worktree Summary (source: Claude Haiku summary, compacted 19m ago)
Developer worked on debugging and fixing Codex message rendering issues in the xuanpu project.

**Observed:**
- Investigated file content being unexpectedly output to the chat interface during file reads in Codex streaming
- Examined event flow through multiple service files: `codex-app-server-manager.ts`, `codex-event-mapper.ts`, `codex-implementer.ts` to understand how events are normalized
- Reviewed type definitions in `opencode.ts` and `agent-protocol.ts` to understand event structures
- Created two new debugging scripts (`codex-rpc-dumper.ts` and `dump-codex-rpc.ts`) to capture and inspect Codex RPC messages for analysis
- Modified `codex-app-server-manager.ts` to add instrumentation for message dumping
- Attempted to run local development environment with `XUANPU_DUMP_CODEX_RPC=1 pnpm dev` but encountered postinstall script failures during electron-builder execution
- Troubleshot dependency issues by checking Python version and running `pnpm install` again to resolve slow postinstall script execution

**Signals:** Build/install process stalled during postinstall script execution (electron-builder native dependencies); unclear if debugging environment was successfully started.

{"method":"item/started","params":{"item":{"type":"commandExecution","id":"call_BCuXJ1J6QfgCaAlOKFZhlANg","command":"bash -lc \"rg -n \\\"CanonicalAgentEvent|type Canonical|interface Canonical\\\" src/shared/types/agent-protocol.ts && sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/types/agent-protocol.ts\"","cwd":"/Users/slicenfer/.xuanpu-worktrees/xuanpu/xuanpu--saint-bernard","processId":null,"source":"agent","status":"inProgress","commandActions":[{"type":"search","command":"rg -n 'CanonicalAgentEvent|type Canonical|interface Canonical' src/shared/types/agent-protocol.ts","query":"CanonicalAgentEvent|type Canonical|interface Canonical","path":"agent-protocol.ts"},{"type":"read","command":"sed -n '1,260p' src/shared/types/agent-protocol.ts","name":"agent-protocol.ts","path":"/Users/slicenfer/.xuanpu-worktrees/xuanpu/xuanpu--saint-bernard/src/shared/types/agent-protocol.ts"}],"aggregatedOutput":null,"exitCode":null,"durationMs":null},"threadId":"019dbeee-c84d-7bf1-a748-8a1338cbb7e0","turnId":"019dc7a9-a6db-7fb1-ba15-cf991b051c85"}}

{"method":"item/completed","params":{"item":{"type":"agentMessage","id":"msg_066c4af22d3ba6480169ed7b5c90608195ab03b285ca33e774","text":"`src/shared/types/agent-protocol.ts:156` 里的 `CanonicalAgentEvent` 是 renderer 消费的统一事件协议，结构是：

```ts
export type CanonicalAgentEvent = EventEnvelope & ( ...union... )
```

也就是**每个事件都必须带统一 envelope**，再叠加不同 `type` 对应的 payload。

**统一 Envelope**
- `eventId`: 事件唯一 ID，用于去重。
- `sessionSequence`: 单 session 内单调递增序号，用于排序。
- `runEpoch`: 当前 hive session 的运行轮次。
- `sourceChannel`: 当前只看到 `'agent:stream'`，由 preload normalizer 标注。

**核心事件族**
- `session.*`: session 生命周期、状态、warning/error、context usage、model limits、commands available 等。
- `message.part.updated`: 流式 part 增量，`data` 是 `AgentPartUpdatedData`，包含 `part`、`delta`、task 状态等。
- `message.updated`: 完整消息/快照更新，`data` 是 `AgentMessageUpdatedData`，包含 `role`、`content`、`usage`、`cost`、`parts` 等。
- `question.*`: 问题请求与回复/拒绝。
- `permission.*`: 权限请求与回复。
- `command.*`: 命令审批、审批结果、审批问题。
- `plan.*`: 计划 ready / resolved，用于 `ExitPlanMode` 这类 plan 流程。

**和 Codex 消息渲染最相关的点**
- `message.part.updated` 是流式渲染入口，Codex 文件读取内容如果被错误打到 chat 里，大概率就是这里的 `part` / `delta` 语义没有区分好“assistant text”和“tool output”。
- `message.updated` 是完整消息快照入口，如果 `parts` 里把 Codex tool result 映射成 text part，也会导致文件内容出现在主消息区。
- `childSessionId?: string` 贯穿多数事件，说明协议支持子任务/子会话路由。
- `runtimeId?: SharedAgentRuntimeId` 用来区分 `opencode`、`claude-code`、`codex`、`terminal`，但大多数 payload 本身还是泛化的。

**一个明显的类型信号**
`AgentPartUpdatedData` 现在比较宽：

```ts
export interface AgentPartUpdatedData {
  part?: Record<string, unknown>
  delta?: string
  type?: 'task'
  taskId?: string
  status?: string
  message?: string
  progress?: number
}
```

它没有强约束 `part.type === 'text' | 'tool' | ...`，所以 renderer 侧必须自己判断。对 Codex 来说，这里很容易把来自工具事件的内容当成普通 assistant text 渲染。这个文件本身看起来是“统一协议层”，真正要定位消息渲染问题，还要继续顺着 `message.part.updated` 的 emit/normalize/map/render 链路查。","phase":"final_answer","memoryCitation":null},"threadId":"019dbeee-c84d-7bf1-a748-8a1338cbb7e0","turnId":"019dc7a9-a6db-7fb1-ba15-cf991b051c85"}}
